user_message: Eric Kim at Coho Winery just sent this. Help me investigate the decline.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-02 16:35 EST
Subject: account health - Action Required

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with account health. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
Date: 2024-02-01 15:21 EST
Subject: Re: account health Discussion - Next Steps

Our team encountered some challenges with account health. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Coho Winery: there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF37-M trap (Outage-handling distributed across email-chat-context and ACR signals -- no firs); produces complete Severity triage, root-cause hypothesis (labeled as hypothesis), customer response draft, ACR risk fl
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF37-M failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF37-M failure mode (Outage-handling distributed across email-chat-context and ACR signals -- no firs)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct account health decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF37-M -- Outage-handling distributed across email-chat-context and ACR signals -- no firs
Produce structural verdict on whether current routing adequately serves this scenario
